candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; matches Total Revenue numerically and is the standard preferred label.
Duplicate total of Revenue; kept as secondary priority in case label changes across periods.
This represents cost of revenues (COGS), not revenue; therefore not selected for REVT.
Finance income is below-operating interest/financial income, not operating revenue.
Interest income is financial income, not revenue from operations.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is a bottom-line comprehensive income measure, not revenue.
Explicit cost of goods sold line; matches Cost of Revenues - Total numerically and is the most direct COGS label.
R&D, not direct production costs; should not be used as COGS.
Selling and distribution are SG&A, not COGS.
Administrative costs are SG&A, not COGS.
Net operating line including multiple components; not a pure COGS measure.
Non-operating, not COGS.
Supplemental R&D, not production cost.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.
This is income, not expense; generally excluded from SG&A components.
Classic SG&A selling/distribution operating expense component.
Classic SG&A administrative operating expense component.
Equity reserve, not P&L expense line; not suitable as SG&A component row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A-type expense components and excluded income and amortization lines as required.

candidates.why: Primary P&L R&D expense line; even though preview shows nans, presence implies values in some years.
Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; R&D-related but more of a depreciation/amortization component.
Impairment of R&D intangibles; irregular and not the core recurring R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Impairment Of Development Projects In Progress
candidates.why: Impairment of in-progress R&D; again not core recurring expense.
Represents capitalization of R&D (often negative expense); not the gross R&D expense itself.
Supplemental line with substantial values; likely the detailed R&D expense disclosure. Used as secondary priority.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D; related but not the main R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross R&D asset; not expense.
Accumulated amortization on balance sheet; not period expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs in Progress, Net
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset for in-progress R&D.

variables.notes: Used the explicit R&D expense line as primary and the populated supplemental R&D expense as secondary, to capture possible label changes over time.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line on bank borrowings; primary interest expense measure.
Residual/remaining value label related to bank interest; kept as lower-priority fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense on lease liabilities; valid interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; used as further fallback label.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line; not used directly for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of explicit interest expense lines; the first non-missing value per year should be used downstream.

candidates.why: Represents total equity; no separate parent vs non-controlling interest lines exist, so this is the best proxy for book equity attributable to owners.
Duplicate of Equity amounts; not needed if Equity is already selected.
Represents total assets/balance sheet size, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest line is present; Equity is therefore treated as book equity attributable to owners.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is a comprehensive income P&L measure, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for non-controlling interests/minority interest appears to be present, so MIB is assumed to be zero.
